pr.title: Add matching DObjForeachAnim and nonmatching JObjForeachAnim
pr.author: r-burns

summary: Replaced an inline assembly animation traversal helper with named C implementations for TObjForeachAnim, RObjForeachAnim, PObjForeachAnim, MObjForeachAnim, and a matching DObjForeachAnim, while keeping JObjForeachAnim as nonmatching C behind NON_MATCHING with the original assembly fallback. The PR also introduced HSD_TypeMask in object.h, using MASK_OF(type) to derive *_MASK constants from existing HSD_Type ordinals, and rewired remaining assembly calls from func_803647DC/func_80364924 to DObjForeachAnim/JObjForeachAnim.
what_changed: Removed the assembly implementation previously exposed as func_803647DC and replaced it with C helpers for PObjForeachAnim, MObjForeachAnim, and DObjForeachAnim.
Renamed the remaining func_80364924 assembly block to JObjForeachAnim and added a NON_MATCHING C version of JObjForeachAnim guarded by #ifdef NON_MATCHING.
Changed TObjForeachAnim and RObjForeachAnim signatures from raw s32 flags plus untyped callback arguments to HSD_TypeMask mask, void (*func)(), AObj_Arg_Type arg_type, and callbackArg* arg.
Replaced numeric callback object type literals such as 0xA and 0xB with named HSD_Type enum constants such as ROBJ_TYPE and TOBJ_TYPE.
Added include/sysdolphin/baselib/dobj.h to aobj.c so the new DObjForeachAnim implementation can use HSD_DObj fields and related types.

Added HSD_TypeMask to object.h with AOBJ_MASK, COBJ_MASK, DOBJ_MASK, FOBJ_MASK, FOG_MASK, JOBJ_MASK, LOBJ_MASK, MOBJ_MASK, POBJ_MASK, ROBJ_MASK, TOBJ_MASK, WOBJ_MASK, RENDER_MASK, CHAN_MASK, TEVREG_MASK, CBOBJ_MASK, and ALL_TYPE_MASK.
Added MASK_OF(type) as a macro in object.h to derive mask bits from HSD_Type values with the expression 1 << ((type) - 1).
Removed stale declarations for TObjForeachAnim, func_803647DC, and func_80364924 from aobj.h.
Updated assembly callsites inside JObjForeachAnim/HSD_ForeachAnim fallback assembly to call DObjForeachAnim and JObjForeachAnim by their recovered names rather than func_803647DC and func_80364924.
smart_moves: Introduced HSD_TypeMask next to HSD_Type in object.h after review discussion noted the relationship between type ordinals and mask bits.
Used a MASK_OF(type) macro instead of manually spelling each bit shift, reducing the chance that mask constants drift from the corresponding HSD_Type enum values.
Renamed mask constants to *_MASK rather than *_BITS to align the naming with the HSD_TypeMask typedef and reviewer preference.
Kept JObjForeachAnim nonmatching behind NON_MATCHING while preserving the matching assembly fallback, allowing readable progress without regressing binary matching.
Converted object-type magic numbers in callbackForeachFunc calls to named constants, improving readability and reducing type-ID mistakes.
Factored the old monolithic assembly traversal into object-specific traversal helpers: PObjForeachAnim, MObjForeachAnim, DObjForeachAnim, RObjForeachAnim, and TObjForeachAnim.
decomp_lessons: When decompiling traversal code that uses bit flags keyed by object type, introduce a typed mask enum and name each mask after the object type rather than carrying raw hex flags through the C.
If mask bits correspond directly to enum ordinals, derive them with a macro so later enum edits are less error-prone.
A partially decompiled function can still be valuable if guarded with NON_MATCHING and paired with the original assembly fallback.
For animation foreach helpers, keep the callback parameters typed consistently across object helpers: HSD_TypeMask mask, void (*func)(), AObj_Arg_Type arg_type, and callbackArg* arg.
Replacing function-address placeholder names in assembly callsites with recovered names improves searchability even before all callees are fully decompiled.
Reviewers favored simpler boolean expressions, e.g. using jobj != NULL in an assert expression instead of negating an equality expression.
naming_conventions: Object traversal helpers follow the pattern <ObjectPrefix>ForeachAnim, e.g. TObjForeachAnim, RObjForeachAnim, PObjForeachAnim, MObjForeachAnim, DObjForeachAnim, JObjForeachAnim.
Type-mask enum constants use uppercase object prefixes with _MASK suffix, e.g. DOBJ_MASK, MOBJ_MASK, POBJ_MASK, ROBJ_MASK, TOBJ_MASK.
Type enum constants use uppercase object prefixes with _TYPE suffix, e.g. DOBJ_TYPE, POBJ_TYPE, JOBJ_TYPE.
The mask typedef was named HSD_TypeMask and placed near the related HSD_Type typedef in object.h.
The macro for deriving a bitmask from an HSD_Type value was named MASK_OF(type).
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Removed the func_803647DC inline assembly block after matching its behavior as DObjForeachAnim plus helper functions.
Left JObjForeachAnim assembly in place under #else while a NON_MATCHING C translation documents intended control flow.

The NON_MATCHING JObjForeachAnim C version mirrors traversal order: assert non-null jobj, process jobj aobj if JOBJ_MASK is set, process dobj via DObjForeachAnim when union_type_dobj(jobj), process robj via RObjForeachAnim, then recurse through children unless JOBJ_INSTANCE is set.

DObjForeachAnim walks a linked list of HSD_DObj nodes, invokes callbackForeachFunc for dobj->aobj under DOBJ_MASK, delegates material traversal to MObjForeachAnim, conditionally delegates pobj traversal under POBJ_MASK, then advances to dobj->next.
PObjForeachAnim checks pobj->flags & 0x3000 for 0x1000 and follows pobj->u.x14_unk->aobj before invoking callbackForeachFunc with POBJ_TYPE.
MObjForeachAnim handles MOBJ_MASK for mobj->aobj and then delegates texture traversal to TObjForeachAnim.
Remaining assembly was updated to branch/link to recovered names DObjForeachAnim and JObjForeachAnim, preserving matching while improving symbol clarity.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: Requested simplifying a confusing assertion expression to use != directly.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: Suggested a typed prototype shape for PObjForeachAnim: HSD_PObj* object, HSD_TypeMask mask, callback function, AObj_Arg_Type, and callbackArg*.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: Discussed defining an HSD_TypeMask enum for object animation traversal masks.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: Asked whether the enum definition should go in aobj.h.

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.feedback: Responded that HSD_TypeMask is very similar to HSD_Type and should be placed next to that enum in object.h.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: Preferred using a MASK_OF(ordinal) macro and renaming *_BITS to *_MASK to match HSD_TypeMask.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that make JObjForeachAnim matching or remove its NON_MATCHING guard.
Search for further cleanup of HSD_TypeMask or MASK_OF usage after PR #552.
Check whether PObjForeachAnim, MObjForeachAnim, DObjForeachAnim, TObjForeachAnim, and RObjForeachAnim prototypes were later moved to headers.
Look for later renames of pobj->u.x14_unk or struct field discoveries related to PObj animation data.
Search for other PRs replacing raw HSD_Type numeric literals with *_TYPE constants.
